name: Engine type
description: Internal combustion, hybrid, plug-in hybrid or electric

name: Gearbox type
description: Manual automatic CVT or dual clutch

name: Clutch type
description: Dry wet single or dual clutch

name: Clutch control
description: Mechanical hydraulic or electronic clutch control

name: Gear shift type
description: Manual sequential electronic or automatic shifting

name: Default start gear
description: Default gear used for vehicle launch

name: Hybrid battery type
description: Battery chemistry used by hybrid system

name: EV mode support
description: Vehicle can operate in electric mode

name: Standing kilometre
description: Time required to cover one kilometre from standstill

name: Cargo volume (VDA)
description: Luggage compartment volume measured according to VDA standard

name: Maximum braked trailer weight
description: Maximum permitted trailer weight with brakes

name: Maximum unbraked trailer weight
description: Maximum permitted trailer weight without brakes

name: Maximum tow ball load
description: Maximum permitted vertical load on the tow ball

name: Gross train weight
description: Maximum permissible combined vehicle and trailer weight

name: AdBlue tank capacity
description: AdBlue tank capacity for diesel SCR systems

name: Combined range
description: Maximum driving range under standard test cycle

name: Electric energy consumption
description: Average electrical energy consumption under standard test cycle

name: Drive layout
description: Vehicle drive configuration (e.g. FWD, RWD, AWD)

name: Differential lock
description: Vehicle equipped with a differential lock

name: Steering type
description: Type of steering system (e.g. hydraulic, electric power steering)

name: Front brake type
description: Front brake design (e.g. ventilated disc, solid disc)

name: Parking brake type
description: Type of parking brake (manual or electric)

name: Spare wheel type
description: Type of spare wheel supplied with the vehicle

name: Tyre pressure monitoring system
description: Vehicle equipped with a tyre pressure monitoring system (TPMS)

name: Wheel material
description: Primary wheel material (e.g. steel or alloy)

name: Locking wheel bolts
description: Vehicle equipped with locking wheel bolts

name: Seasonal tyre type
description: Factory supplied tyre season (summer, winter or all-season)

name: Recommended front tyre pressure
description: Recommended cold inflation pressure for front tyres

name: Recommended rear tyre pressure
description: Recommended cold inflation pressure for rear tyres

name: Minimum wheel size
description: Minimum approved wheel size for the vehicle

name: Maximum wheel size
description: Maximum approved wheel size for the vehicle

name: Front track width
description: Distance between the centres of the front wheels

name: Rear track width
description: Distance between the centres of the rear wheels

name: Front overhang
description: Distance from front axle to front end of vehicle

name: Rear overhang
description: Distance from rear axle to rear end of vehicle

name: Ground clearance (laden)
description: Ground clearance at maximum authorised mass

name: Load sill height
description: Height of luggage compartment loading sill

name: Number of side doors
description: Number of passenger side doors excluding tailgate

name: Tailgate type
description: Type of rear opening (tailgate, barn doors, sedan boot)

name: Power tailgate
description: Vehicle equipped with electrically operated tailgate

name: Keyless entry
description: Vehicle equipped with passive keyless entry

name: Keyless start
description: Vehicle equipped with push-button engine start

name: Rear child safety locks
description: Rear doors equipped with child safety locks

name: Fuel filler side
description: Side of vehicle where fuel filler is located

name: Locking fuel filler
description: Fuel filler protected by central locking

name: Massaging front seats
description: Front seats equipped with massage function

name: Fold-flat front passenger seat
description: Front passenger seat can fold flat

name: Passenger seat memory
description: Front passenger seat position memory available

name: ISOFIX front
description: ISOFIX anchor points available on front passenger seat

name: ISOFIX rear
description: ISOFIX anchor points available on rear seats

name: Top tether anchor points
description: Number of top tether anchor points

name: Easy entry second row
description: Easy-entry mechanism for access to rear seats

name: Window type
description: Type of vehicle windows (fixed, sliding, etc.)

name: Privacy glass
description: Tinted rear side and rear windows

name: Blind spot monitoring system
description: System detecting vehicles in blind spots

name: Headlights type
description: Type of headlights (halogen, LED, matrix LED)

name: Automatic headlights
description: Automatic headlight activation based on ambient light

name: Coming home lighting
description: Delayed exterior lighting after locking vehicle

name: Interior lighting zones
description: Number of configurable interior lighting zones

name: Lane departure warning
description: Warns when vehicle leaves lane unintentionally

name: Automatic emergency braking
description: Automatically applies brakes in critical situations

name: Intelligent speed limiter
description: Adjusts speed limit based on road signs

name: Rear cross traffic alert
description: Warns of crossing traffic when reversing

name: Rear cross traffic braking
description: Automatically brakes when rear cross traffic detected

name: Dual zone climate control
description: Separate driver and passenger temperature zones

name: On-board computer
description: Vehicle information computer available to the driver

name: Wireless smartphone replication
description: Wireless smartphone screen and application replication

name: Steering wheel height adjustment
description: Steering wheel can be adjusted vertically

name: Steering wheel reach adjustment
description: Steering wheel can be adjusted longitudinally

name: Front centre armrest
description: Front centre console includes an armrest

name: Adjustable boot floor
description: Luggage compartment floor has multiple height positions

name: Manual day/night rear-view mirror
description: Interior rear-view mirror has manual day and night positions

name: High-filtering glass
description: Vehicle glazing has enhanced light or heat filtering

name: LED headlights
description: Main headlight system uses LED technology

name: Fog lights
description: Vehicle is equipped with fog lights

name: Third brake light
description: Vehicle has a high-mounted third stop lamp

name: Cruise control
description: Vehicle speed can be maintained automatically

name: One-touch turn signals
description: Brief indicator input triggers a programmed flash sequence

name: Hill-start assist
description: Vehicle assists the driver when starting on a gradient

name: Heated steering wheel
description: Steering wheel includes an electric heating function

name: Rear seat-belt pretensioners
description: Rear seating positions include seat-belt pretensioning.

name: Seat-belt reminder
description: Vehicle warns occupants when a seat belt is not fastened.

name: Passenger front airbag
description: Frontal airbag for the front passenger.

name: Emergency stop signal
description: Hazard warning lights activate automatically under hard braking.

name: Rear three-point seat belts
description: Rear seating positions use three-point seat belts.

name: Emergency call eCall
description: Vehicle supports the European eCall emergency-call function.

name: Central locking
description: Vehicle doors are controlled by a central locking system.

name: Front side airbags
description: Front occupants are protected by side airbags.

name: Curtain airbags
description: Vehicle is equipped with curtain airbags.

name: Anti-lock braking system
description: Anti-lock braking system prevents wheel lock under braking.

name: Tyre repair kit
description: Vehicle includes a tyre puncture repair kit.

name: Front seat-belt pretensioners
description: Front seat belts include pyrotechnic pretensioners.

name: Safe-distance warning
description: Vehicle warns when the following distance is unsafe.

name: Driver seat-belt height adjustment
description: Driver seat-belt upper anchorage can be adjusted for height.

name: Automatic door locking
description: Doors lock automatically after the vehicle starts moving.

name: Alcohol interlock preparation
description: Vehicle is prepared for installation of an alcohol interlock.

name: Upholstery variant
description: Commercial upholstery variant or normalized source description.

name: Exterior colour
description: Commercial exterior body colour or normalized source description.

name: Standard tyre specification
description: Complete axle-neutral standard tyre specification including nominal size, load index and speed symbol.

name: Noise level at 50 km/h
description: Vehicle noise level measured at 50 km/h without inferring measurement location or test procedure

name: Maximum payload
description: Maximum permitted payload stated explicitly by the source without deriving it from other mass values

name: Total valve count
description: Total number of engine valves stated explicitly by the source; distinct from valves per cylinder

name: Minimum kerb weight
description: Minimum vehicle kerb weight explicitly qualified as minimum by the source; distinct from unqualified kerb weight

name: Cargo volume VDA to luggage-cover height
description: Luggage compartment volume measured according to VDA up to the source-stated luggage-cover or roller-blind height

name: Cargo volume VDA to seat-back height
description: Luggage compartment volume measured according to VDA up to the source-stated seat-back height

name: Total LPG vessel capacity
description: Total internal capacity of the LPG pressure vessel

name: LPG vessel filling capacity
description: Source-stated LPG volume available or permitted for filling, distinct from total vessel capacity

name: Total hybrid system power
description: Source-stated total output of the complete hybrid propulsion system; not a calculated sum of component powers

name: Roof rails
description: Roof rails fitted as standard or option.

name: Modular roof rails
description: Roof rails convertible for transverse load carrying.

name: Electric driver seat adjustment
description: Electric adjustment of the driver seat.

name: Passenger seat height adjustment
description: Height adjustment for the front passenger seat.

name: My Safety button
description: Dedicated control for selected driver-assistance systems.

name: Door-open warning
description: Warning for an incompletely closed door.

name: Eco-leather steering wheel
description: Steering wheel covered with synthetic eco leather.

name: Rear-seat Easy Fold system
description: Easy Fold mechanism for the split rear seat backrest.

name: 12 V boot socket
description: 12-volt power socket in the luggage compartment.

name: Rear USB-C ports
description: USB-C charging ports for second-row passengers.

name: LED cabin lighting
description: LED lighting in the passenger compartment.

name: Remote firmware updates
description: Firmware updates delivered over the air.

name: Particulate filter
description: Presence of a particulate filter stated explicitly by the source without inferring filter technology.

name: Hybrid system voltage
description: Source-stated voltage class of the complete hybrid system; distinct from component nominal voltage.

name: Source-stated hybrid battery capacity
description: Hybrid battery capacity exactly as stated by the source without classifying it as gross, net or usable.

name: Cargo volume without spare wheel (ISO 3832)
description: Maximum luggage-compartment volume without a spare wheel measured according to ISO 3832.

name: Maximum cargo volume (ISO 3832)
description: Maximum source-stated luggage-compartment volume measured according to ISO 3832.
